task_summary: Add SP10 companion export contract documentation with local fixture schema examples, stable markdown output contracts for every mode, README link, and all-mode output-file compatibility test.
notes: Mew implemented SP10 with --model gpt-5.5 under experiments/mew-companion-log only. Session #18 authored CONTRACT.md, a README pointer, and an all-mode output-file compatibility test; the focused verifier passed with 31 tests. Codex reviewer found one contract mismatch after verification: dogfood-digest was documented as heading '# Companion Dogfood Digest:' while the renderer emits '# Dogfood Digest:'. Session #19 repaired the contract text and the focused verifier passed again with 31 tests. No Codex product-code rescue was used.
